elections.note: Certified final = 669,627 ballots (Election Day 298,112 + VBM 371,515) from CA SoS 2012 Voter Participation Statistics by County, primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: Riverside's Sequoia 'eresults' live page (voteinfo.net/Elections/20121106/eresults/) was not archived on/near election night, and Riverside used no Dominion ElectionSummaryReport before 2019. WebFetch blocked; curl+CDX+headless-Chrome used.

Certified final = 357,764 ballots (Election Day 124,829 + VBM 232,935) from CA SoS 2014 complete Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics page, primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: the only Wayback capture of the eresults page is 2014-11-20 (post-certification canvass), no election-night-stage snapshot.

Certified final = 769,193 ballots (Election Day 264,638 + VBM 504,555) from CA SoS 2016 Voter Participation Statistics by County, primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: earliest Wayback capture of the Sequoia eresults page is 2016-11-10, and its data frame is locked to 'Last Updated November 11, 2016 4:54 PM' showing 532,023 ballots (202,100 Election-Day + 329,923 VBM) -- that is a 3-day-post canvass update, NOT the election-night plateau, so it is not reported here. No election-night-stage (Nov 8-9) snapshot exists in Wayback. snapshot inspected 20161110234008 / 20161111103722.

Certified final = 650,545 ballots (Election Day 194,606 + VBM 455,939) from CA SoS 2018 Voter Participation Statistics by County; corroborated by Riverside Summary_Final.pdf (Run Date/Time 12/7/18). Primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: earliest Wayback capture of the eresults page is 2018-11-28 (post-certification); no election-night-stage snapshot exists.

Election-night plateau = 205,813 ballots ('Voters Cast: 205,813 of 1,310,928 (15.70%)'; Governor Times Cast 205,813) from the official Riverside Dominion EMS 'Semi-Official Election Results' report, Last-Modified 11/09/2022 02:04 PST (the ~2 a.m. final election-night report, within the hourly-until-3am window). This held as the live page until the first canvass update (300,498, Last-Modified 11/11/2022) -- i.e. it plateaued through the next day before the multi-day canvass resumed, matching the metric. Corroborated by Idyllwild Town Crier (Nov 9, 2022): election-night counting complete at ~205,000 with ~335,000 ballots remaining. 205,813/604,617 = 34.0%. Certified final 604,617 (Election Day 59,812 + VBM 544,805) from CA SoS, primary. snapshot 20221109110809 used. First epollbook general.

611,101 'Ballots Counted' from the earliest Wayback capture of Riverside's livevoterturnout ENR, embedded timestamp 'Updated: 11/6/2024 5:35:21 PM' -- the FIRST daily canvass update (afternoon of the day after the Nov 5 election), NOT the ~3 a.m. election-night plateau. Riverside reports hourly until ~3 a.m. then updates daily (excl. Sundays); the true 3 a.m. plateau is unarchived (no Wayback ENR capture before 11/6 evening) and is modestly LOWER than 611,101, so 611,101/959,098 = 63.7% slightly OVER-states the election-night share and is NOT strictly stage-comparable to the clean 2 a.m. 2022 figure. Next captures: 685,126 (11/9), 912,011 (11/15). Certified final 959,098 (Election Day 170,437 + VBM 788,661) from CA SoS, primary. snapshot 20241107034053 used. Post-epollbook, pre-ASV.
